options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: skill_hunting
options.description:
Enable Skill Hunting. When ON, skills are added to the AP item pool as
useful items — quests unlock skills from the randomized pool.

Can be combined with Zone Locking (both ON = hybrid mode).

options.name: zone_locking
options.description:
Enable Zone Locking. When ON, the game is gated by 18 semi-random
boss-kill gates per difficulty (4 per act, 2 for Act 4). Each gate
boss drop sends a check; receiving the gate key opens the next region.

Can be combined with Skill Hunting (both ON = hybrid mode).

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determines what condition you must satisfy to win.

Full Normal:     beat Baal on Normal.
Full Nightmare:  beat Baal on Normal AND Nightmare.
Full Hell:       beat Baal on Normal, Nightmare, AND Hell.
Gold Collection: simple lifetime-gold goal. Win when your
                 character's lifetime gold reaches the value set
                 in 'Collection: Gold Target'. No other constraints.
Custom:          build your own win condition with checkboxes.
                 Toggle on any combination of the 50+ Custom Goal
                 options below (subsystems, act bosses, specific
                 kills, bulk checks) and an optional
                 custom_goal_gold_target. Goal completes when ALL
                 selected items are achieved AND lifetime gold
                 reaches the gold target. AP-only — standalone
                 defaults to Full Normal.

options.name: collection_gold_target
options.description:
[Goal=Gold Collection only] Lifetime-gold threshold the
character must reach to win. Lifetime-gold counter on the F1
Collection page is monotonic (never decreases) and tracks gold
pickup + quest rewards (excludes vendor sales). 0 = trivially
complete (don't pick Gold Collection in that case — pick a real
Goal instead).

options.name: custom_goal_gold_target
options.description:
[Goal=Custom only] Optional lifetime-gold threshold added on
top of every other selected Custom Goal target. 0 = no gold
requirement. Same monotonic lifetime gold counter the Gold
Collection goal uses (pickup + quest rewards, excludes vendor
sales).

options.name: quest_hunting
options.description: Include SuperUnique hunting quests (Corpsefire, Bishibosh, etc).

options.name: quest_kill_zones
options.description: Include zone-clear quests (kill X monsters in Blood Moor, etc).

options.name: quest_exploration
options.description: Include zone-exploration quests (enter Blood Moor, Cold Plains, etc).

options.name: quest_waypoints
options.description: Include waypoint-activation quests.

options.name: quest_level_milestones
options.description: Include level milestone quests (Reach Level 5, 10, 15... 50).

options.name: skill_class_filter
options.description:
Filter which class skills are included in the pool.

All Classes: All 7 classes (210 total skills in pool).
Custom: Only selected classes via the class-toggle options below.

options.name: include_amazon
options.description: Include Amazon skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).

options.name: include_sorceress
options.description: Include Sorceress skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).

options.name: include_necromancer
options.description: Include Necromancer skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).

options.name: include_paladin
options.description: Include Paladin skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).

options.name: include_barbarian
options.description: Include Barbarian skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).

options.name: include_druid
options.description: Include Druid skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).

options.name: include_assassin
options.description:
Include Assassin skills in the pool (when Class Filter = Custom).
Trap skills are always excluded to prevent the invisible-character bug
on non-Assassin classes. This matches 1.8.0 in-game behaviour.

options.name: xp_multiplier
options.description:
Multiply XP gains from monster kills (1 = vanilla, up to 10x).
Higher = faster leveling, less grind.

options.name: monster_shuffle
options.description: Shuffle monster types across zones. Each game gets a new monster layout.

options.name: boss_shuffle
options.description: Shuffle SuperUnique boss placements across zones.

options.name: entrance_shuffle
options.description:
Shuffle dead-end cave entrances across each character's seed.
Pool A (Acts 1+2) and Pool B (Acts 3+4+5) are shuffled
independently so progression remains solvable.

Frozen at character creation — once baked into the per-character
state file, AP reconnects can't change it.

options.name: traps_enabled
options.description:
Enable trap fillers in the item pool. When OFF, traps are removed
entirely — that share of the filler pool is redistributed proportionally
to the other filler types (gold, stat points, skill points, reset
points, boss-loot drops) so the pool stays balanced.

Default ON to preserve existing trap-bearing seeds. Turn OFF if you
don't want DeathLink-style monster-spawn traps in your run.

options.name: skill_level_reqs
options.description:
1.9.10 — Enforce vanilla Skills.txt level requirements in the
in-game skill editor. When ON (default), clicking the "+" button on
a skill that requires a higher character level than yours is
rejected with a notify. When OFF, points can be invested into any
unlocked skill regardless of character level — useful for quick
cross-class experimentation. Item level/STR/DEX requirements are
separately controlled by D2's vanilla engine and are not affected
by this toggle (this only affects the skill-investment editor).

options.name: check_shrines
options.description:
Add 50 shrine activations per difficulty as AP locations.
Smashing a shrine rolls the escalating-chance check (avg ~3.5 tries
per slot). Filler-only — no progression items are placed here.

options.name: check_urns
options.description:
Add 100 urn/jar destructions per difficulty as AP locations.
Plenty of urns in tombs/dungeons make this easy to fill.
Filler-only.

options.name: check_barrels
options.description:
Add 100 barrel destructions per difficulty as AP locations.
Filler-only.

options.name: check_chests
options.description:
Add 200 chest openings per difficulty as AP locations.
All chest types count (small/large/super/locked).
Filler-only.

options.name: check_set_pickups
options.description:
Fire an AP check the first time you pick up each unique set piece.
Up to 127 checks total across all set pieces. Respects the 32
individual collect_set_* toggles — pieces of disabled sets don't
count.

options.name: check_gold_milestones
options.description:
Add 17 lifetime-gold milestone checks. Normal grants 7 milestones
up to 3M, Nightmare adds 5 more up to 6M, Hell adds the final 5
up to 12M. Uses the same lifetime gold counter as Goal=Collection.

options.name: check_cow_level
options.description:
Cow Level expansion: 9 AP locations covering first entry per
difficulty (3), Cow King kills per difficulty (3), and lifetime
cow-kill milestones at 100/500/1000 (3). Great if your goal
includes farming the Moo Moo Farm.

options.name: check_merc_milestones
options.description:
Mercenary milestones: 6 AP locations covering first hire,
5/10/25/50 lifetime resurrections, and reaching merc level 30+.
Encourages keeping a merc alive across the campaign.

options.name: check_hellforge_runes
options.description:
Hellforge + High Runes: 12 AP locations covering Hellforge use
per difficulty (3) and first pickup of each high-rune tier
(Pul-Gul, Vex-Ber, Jah-Zod) per difficulty (9). Pure
progression encouragement for endgame rune farming.

options.name: check_npc_dialogue
options.description:
Per-NPC dialogue: 81 AP locations covering first dialogue with
each major NPC across all 3 difficulties. 1.9.2 ships the
apworld locations and AP wiring; the in-game DLL detection hook
lands in 1.9.3 (until then the slots can be unlocked via the
AP server's /release command if you want to test the placement).

options.name: check_runeword_crafting
options.description:
Runeword crafting: 50 AP locations covering the first time you
create each runeword. 1.9.2 ships the apworld locations and AP
wiring; in-game detection hangs off the existing Coll_ProcessItem
runeword-flag transition and is finalized in 1.9.3.

options.name: check_cube_recipes
options.description:
Horadric cube recipe completions: 135 AP locations covering the
first successful completion of each cube recipe. 1.9.2 ships the
apworld locations and AP wiring; the cube-state diff detection
lands in 1.9.3.

options.name: collection_target_gems
options.description:
Whether all 35 gems (7 colors × 5 grades, Chipped..Perfect)
count toward F1 Collection book completion + Custom Goal's
'include collection' option. Each individual gem pickup still
fires an AP check when this toggle is ON. Moved out of Goal &
Win Condition in 1.9.2 — now lives under Collection — Gems.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_skill_hunting
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires unlocking every skill in your seeded skill pool (up to 210).

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_collection
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires the F1 Collection book to be complete according to the existing Collection — Sets/Runes/Gems/Specials toggles. Mix of items required is configured in those collection groups.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_hunt_quests
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires all 'Hunt: <SuperUnique>' quests across all 3 difficulties (~42 quests).

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_kill_zone_quests
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires all 'Kill all monsters in <area>' quests across all 3 difficulties.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_exploration_quests
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires all 'Reach <area>' exploration quests across all 3 difficulties.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_waypoints
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires activating every waypoint across all 3 difficulties (~38 waypoints × 3 = 114).

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_level_milestones
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires reaching every level milestone (5/10/15/.../99) across all 3 difficulties.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_story_normal
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires every story quest (Den of Evil, Sisters Burial, ..., Eve of Destruction) on Normal.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_story_nightmare
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires every story quest on Nightmare.

options.name: custom_goal_subsystem_story_hell
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires every story quest on Hell.

options.name: custom_goal_kill_uber_diablo
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Uber Diablo in the Forgotten Sands (Pandemonium event).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_uber_baal
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Uber Baal in the Matron's Den (Pandemonium event).

options.name: custom_goal_hellfire_torch_complete
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires completing one full Pandemonium event (all 3 ubers + Hellfire Torch drop).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_bishibosh
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Bishibosh (Cold Plains super-unique).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_corpsefire
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Corpsefire (Den of Evil super-unique).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_rakanishu
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Rakanishu (Stony Field super-unique).

options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Griswold (Tristram super-unique).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_pindleskin
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Pindleskin (Nihlathak's Temple super-unique).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_nihlathak_su
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing Nihlathak the boss (Halls of Vaught).

options.name: custom_goal_kill_summoner
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires killing The Summoner (Arcane Sanctuary).

groups.name: Custom Goal — Bulk Object/Check Targets (when Goal=Custom)

options.name: custom_goal_all_shrines
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing every shrine bonus check (50/diff × 3 diff = 150). Requires check_shrines=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_urns
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing every urn bonus check (100/diff × 3 = 300). Requires check_urns=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_barrels
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing every barrel bonus check. Requires check_barrels=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_chests
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing every chest bonus check. Requires check_chests=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_set_pickups
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires picking up every unique set piece (127 total). Requires check_set_pickups=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_gold_milestones
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires hitting every lifetime-gold milestone (17 total). Requires check_gold_milestones=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_cow_level_checks
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing all 9 cow-level extra checks. Requires check_cow_level=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_merc_milestones
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing all 6 merc milestone checks. Requires check_merc_milestones=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_hellforge_runes
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing all 12 Hellforge+High Rune checks. Requires check_hellforge_runes=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_npc_dialogue
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires firing all 81 NPC dialogue checks (27 NPCs × 3 diff). Requires check_npc_dialogue=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_runeword_crafting
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires crafting 50 runewords. Requires check_runeword_crafting=true.

options.name: custom_goal_all_cube_recipes
options.description: [Goal=Custom] Win requires completing 135 successful cube transmutes. Requires check_cube_recipes=true.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
